name: ZTNAApplicationRequest
description: ZTNAApplicationRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks ZTNA Connector API

name.description: Display name for the ZTNA application.

group_id.description: Connector group ID to use for accessing the application.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name of the private application.

ports.description: TCP/UDP ports to expose through ZTNA.

enabled.description: Whether to enable ZTNA access immediately after creation.
